title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.858 - Jurisdiction for disputes, circuit court of Cole County
text:
70.858.  Jurisdiction for disputes, circuit court of Cole County. — Jurisdiction over any dispute regarding the interpretation of sections 70.840 to 70.858 and the determinations required hereunder shall lie in the circuit court of Cole County.
(L. 1989 S.B. 295 & 312 § 31)
